LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TopWarning: Changing these options may require restarting the game to apply. Some changes may not apply to pawns that have already spawned.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_BottomWarning: Don't see the options you chose? Restart your game!
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainCheckDesc: Allow injures to be retended if less than the quality set below.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainDesc: Injuries tended below this level will be redone.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainCheckDise: Allow diseases to be retended if less than the quality set below.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainDiseaseDe: Diseases tended below this level will be redone.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainCheckInfe: Allow Infections to be retended if less than the quality set below.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainInfection: Infections tended below this level will be redone.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_Append: Current tend quality too low, set to be redone.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TreatAgain_Append: Current treatment quality too low, set to be redone.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainGuestsDes: Allows guests and allies of the colony to be retended.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainPrisoners: Allows colony prisoners to be retended.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainSlavesDes: Allows colony slaves to be retended.
LanguageData.BattIePatch_TendAgain_TendAgainAnimalsDe: Allows colony animals to be retended.
